steps.title: Identify the coordinates
steps.content: On the scatterplot, the $x$-coordinate represents weight in pounds and the $y$-coordinate represents offspring. The question gives a weight of $50$ pounds, so use the plotted point whose horizontal coordinate is $50$.

steps.title: Read the plotted point
steps.content: The point with $x=50$ has coordinate $(50,6)$, so the wolf produced $6$ offspring.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: Choice A, $8$, is too high. Choice B, $7$, is also above the plotted value. Choice D, $5$, is below the plotted value. The plotted value is $6$. The answer is C.
